case_title: CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY VS. TRAVIS L. WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT WILLIAM, TRAVIS L. WILLIAM, EDDIE J. HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
RECORD ON APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER.
MINUTES FOR MAR-20-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2002 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF 3/20/02 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY $2,637.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,637.93, SEE SCANNED DOC COST PER COST BILL IN THE SUM OF $120.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
